name: caltitude
description: Turns forwarded travel emails (flights, hotels, car rentals) into Nextcloud calendar events. Reads new mail from an allowlist of senders, extracts each item via a sandboxed reader, and creates events on a chosen Nextcloud calendar. Bundles its own Nextcloud connector.

nextcloud_host.title: Nextcloud URL
nextcloud_host.description: Your Nextcloud server address, e.g. https://cloud.example.com

nextcloud_app_password.title: Nextcloud app password
nextcloud_app_password.description: Create one in Nextcloud → Settings → Security → Devices & sessions. Not your login password.
